title: Beneath Bedrock
body:
Hello reader! Before playing I want to let you know: **_This was done as part of a code camp that lasted a week, around 6 hours a day for 5 days. Also, this is my first mod ever._** So don't get your hopes up too high!

I also want to note that this mod is still in beta. Will it ever leave beta? Probably not. But it is still in beta. So anyway, here is the description!

Lastly, the mod crashed when I tried to do specific biomes, so the mod features are ONLY IN GENERIC BIOMES!! No badlands, no river, no dripstone caves. Plains type biomes, forest type biomes, etc are all good though. Probably. Do it in plains, desert, or forest just to be safe.

Across the overworld, patches of cracked bedrock can be found at the world's bottom. Using a netherite pickaxe or greater on these blocks will open them up, and allow you to fall through. Large spikes (i know they don't look like spikes, bear with me) make the underside surface feel jagged. At the tips of these spikes, a new ore can be found, Umbrite. Umbrite chunks can be crafted with diamonds and a Netherite Ingot to make an Umbrite Ingot, which is the gear set above Netherite. 

So that's it! I hope you enjoy! :D
